data.title: 国际服emoji转推活动「Arona's Gift Event」
data.summary: [Arona's Gift Event] Twitter emojis of 3 students have been added in celebration of the grand openin
data.body:
[Arona's Gift Event]

Twitter emojis of 3 students have been added in celebration of the grand opening!
Follow 
@EN_BlueArchive
, choose a character you like, retweet, and 30 Sensei's will be selected for a gift.

Participation Period: 11/12 (Fri) – 11/18 (Thu)

#BlueArchive
![1YxF9qWSn7ewvHpVnc8QF30lESDhmPga.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/1YxF9qWSn7ewvHpVnc8QF30lESDhmPga.jpg)
